name: appsource-v1
description: First AppSource package scope: analytics (univariate) and calculators (distribution hub).

analytics.name: Interactive Analytics
analytics.tagline: Core statistical modeling, comparisons, and discovery tools

calculators.name: Interactive Calculators
calculators.tagline: Purpose-built families for probability, planning, and conversion

modules.label: Univariate
modules.tip: Distribution summaries, outliers, and normality checks for single variables.

calculators.title: Distribution calculators
calculators.subtitle: Probability, quantiles, and tails for common distributions

modules.label: Distribution Hub
modules.tip: Open the distribution family hub in a dialog.
